note: Master list of Michigan abortion providers ('mills' in abolitionist usage). One row per physical location. The `city` field is a canonical Michigan city name and is the join key with lib/data/cities.ts — a city's landing page pulls the mills whose `city` matches its `name`. Coordinates are the Census-geocoded lat/lng, kept here so the eventual statewide mill map can render without re-geocoding at request time. Add new rows as they're verified; use `phone` and `url` when publicly available.

mills.name: Planned Parenthood of Michigan — Detroit Health Center
Scotsdale Women's Center
mills.address: 19305 W Seven Mile Rd, Detroit, MI 48219
mills.notes: Rosedale Park (NW Detroit). Surgical abortion up to 15w6d; medication abortion up to 11w.
